publication: Kempynck, N., De Winter, S., et al. CREsted: modeling genomic and synthetic cell type-specific enhancers across tissues and species. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.13918932
description: DeepBICCN2 is a deep learning model for predicting chromatin accessibility across multiple brain cell types in mouse. The model was trained on BICCN data and outputs Tn5 cut-site counts representing accessibility.
